nodes.speaker: Sky Tinker
nodes.text: I build all kinds of ships. It's practically a mania!

nodes.speaker: Sky Tinker
nodes.text: Take a look. The road is rough out there.

nodes.speaker: Sky Tinker
nodes.text: The passion is there but the materials are lacking. Bring me the right items and I can get some of these old projects up and running.

nodes.speaker: Sky Tinker
nodes.text: She's made of sturdy wood and made to sail the seas.

nodes.speaker: Sky Tinker
nodes.text: I built the airship, but it only runs on the power of all four rune stones. If someone ever got all four resonating again, I am sure she would fly!
